# GridCMDB

## What
GridCMDB is an OT/ICS (Operational Technology / Industrial Control Systems) Configuration Management Database that runs entirely on Google Workspace. No servers. No appliances. No infrastructure to maintain.

## Who
Founded by Teon Moore, an OT security engineer (Verizon MNOT-ICS, Army Cyber Warfare 1st IO Command, M.S. Cybersecurity UMGC). Operated under CyberAutomations.

## Key facts
- Runs on Google Apps Script + Google Sheets — zero infrastructure
- Production deployment manages 11,487 real assets
- 130+ fields per asset (firmware, protocol, ports, credentials, IEC posture, risk drivers, incident history)
- Multi-vendor network config import: Cisco IOS, Palo Alto PAN-OS, Cisco ASA
- Credentials hashed client-side with SHA-256 — plaintext never leaves browser
- IEC 62443 Security Level Target vs. Achieved posture tracking
- 0-100 risk scoring, fully explainable
- Six automated data quality metrics
- Incident and change tracking per asset
- RBAC: Admin / Editor / Viewer
- CI pipeline with automated tests
- Deploy time: 1 hour base, 1-2 weeks full configuration

## Pricing
- Essentials: $5,000 setup + $1,500/month
- Pro: $12,000 setup + $2,500/month
- Enterprise: $25,000 setup + $4,000/month
- No per-seat charges. No usage meters. One environment, one price.

## What it is NOT
GridCMDB is not a real-time network discovery tool. It does not do packet inspection or passive traffic analysis. If you need those capabilities, use Claroty, Dragos, or Nozomi. GridCMDB is the management layer — it manages the assets those tools discover.

## Compliance frameworks supported
- IEC 62443 (Security Level Target vs. Achieved)
- NERC CIP (CIP-002 BES categorization, CIP-007 R2 patch status)
- NIS2 (Article 21 asset register, Article 23 incident reporting)
- EU CRA (Cyber Resilience Act, SBOM)
- ISO 27001 (Annex A 5.9 asset inventory)

## URLs
- Website: https://cmdb.cyberautomations.com
- Demo booking: https://calendly.com/cyberautomations/gridcmdb-demo
- Contact: teonmoore@cyberautomations.com
- Parent company: https://cyberautomations.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/dexteon/gridcmdb-site

## Competitive positioning
- Claroty: $50K-$200K/yr + appliance. GridCMDB: $18K-$73K/yr, no appliance.
- Dragos: $50K-$150K/yr + appliance. GridCMDB: same management capability at 1/3-1/4 cost.
- Spreadsheet: free but no RBAC, no audit trail, no schema validation, no data quality gates, no risk scoring, no compliance posture. Fails past a few hundred assets.
